summary: Full UI/UX + UAT audit of NNPL corporate site across 8 viewports (320/375/414/768/1024/1366/1440/1920) and all 10 navigable pages. CONTENT COMPLIANCE: PASS — zero stale strings across every rendered page (grep + runtime body-text scan for GPCB, 826010, 'Western India', 'ISO 14001', 'Client 01', info@/no-reply@nilaynarayan.com, encoding artifacts). BROCHURE FACTS: mostly PASS — PAN AAMFN8830F, GSTIN 20AAMFN8830F1ZD, PIN 828109, email nilaynarayanpolychem@gmail.com present on all 10 pages (via Footer); TC-17291 on Home/Certifications/NABL-Lab; JSPCB Authorised on 3 pages; ISO 22241 on Home + Certifications. HOWEVER: website URL 'www.nnpolychem.com' from brochure is not rendered anywhere on the site (0/10 pages). PHONE NUMBERS: PASS — Call-Us dropdown shows Sales +91 91994 39902 → Operations +91 80843 71124 → Compliance +91 82925 84106 in exact order. BROCHURE DOWNLOAD: PASS — hero-brochure-btn triggers download of NNPL_Company_Profile_Brochure.pdf, 2,977,860 bytes (2.84 MB), verified 10-page valid PDF starting with %PDF-1.4 header, page 1 text contains 'PAN: AAMFN8830F · GSTIN: 20AAMFN8830F1ZD · Website – NNPOLYCHEM.COM'. DEAD-BUTTON SWEEP: PASS — 0 dead buttons/anchors across all 10 pages (all have href, testid, type or handler). CONVERSION CLARITY: PASS — Hero Get Quote opens QuoteDialog and submitted successfully (TEST_UAT_Quote + TEST_UAT_Quote2 persisted in Mongo, admin API confirms), /contact form (TEST_UAT_Contact persisted, invalid email blocked by native validation, XSS payload stored inert), /vendor-onboarding (TEST_UAT_Vendor_Co persisted), NABL Lab has 'Get Quote / Request Testing / Enquire Drinking Water Test / Request a Quote' CTAs, Hazardous Waste has 'Get Quote / Request Waste Pickup' CTAs. Products page has TDS/SDS/Enquire on all 9 cards. RESPONSIVENESS: PASS on horizontal scroll — verified no page-level h-scroll at ANY of the 8 viewports across all 10 pages (only decorative absolutely-positioned blobs and marquee items overflow, all safely clipped by overflow-hidden parents). Mobile 320/375/414 hamburger opens clean menu with Home/About/Services (Hazardous+NABL sub-links)/Products/Industries/Certifications/Vendors/Contact + Get Quote CTA. HEADER 1024px: FAIL — 'Get Quote' primary CTA is clipped 53px off the right edge (button spans left=998→right=1077 in a 1024 viewport). Also 'Corporate Brochure' hero stat button is cut off at 1024. FOOTER: PASS — 4-col desktop, stacks cleanly on mobile, PAN & GST visible, address matches brochure, © 2026 correct. FLOATING WHATSAPP: PASS — visible every page, https://wa.me/919199439902 correct. PRODUCTS: PASS — 9 products, 9/9 'BATCH TESTED' badges, 9/9 real images loaded (naturalWidth 1123–1536px), 9/9 Request TDS + Request SDS + Enquire buttons, filter search '395' returns 1 card, NN-PlastiFlo not present. CERTIFICATIONS: PASS — TC-17291, ISO/IEC 17025:2017, ISO 22241, ISO 9001, ISO 45001, Factory Licence, CGWA all present; forbidden items absent (ISO 14001, JSPCB HW Authorisation, CPCB Co-processing). ADMIN: PASS — /admin/login accepts admin@nilaynarayan.com/NN@dmin2025, redirects to dashboard, Overview shows Enquiries+Vendors sections. FORM VALIDATION: PASS — invalid email blocks contact submit, valid submit produces success. CONSOLE ERRORS: PASS — 0 errors + 0 warnings across all 10 pages at all viewports. UAT VERDICT: PASS-WITH-MINOR — site is tender-grade compliant on content and functionality; only cosmetic layout issue at exactly 1024px header + missing website URL string.

ui_bugs.issue: At exactly 1024px viewport (iPad landscape / small laptop) the primary 'Get Quote' CTA button is horizontally clipped 53px off the right edge — only ~26px of the button remains visible. Trigger: at 1024px the nav collapses from mobile hamburger to full desktop nav but header content sum (logo 161 + 7 nav items 62–110 wide + Call Us 117 + Get Quote 79 + gaps + padding) exceeds container. Fix: raise 'lg' breakpoint on the desktop nav to 1152px or tighten nav item gaps/padding at lg.

ui_bugs.component: Home hero — Corporate Brochure stat card button
ui_bugs.issue: At 1024px viewport the label 'Corporate Brochure PDF · 2.9 MB' text-truncates as 'Corporate Bro...' because the container's right edge extends past viewport. Same root cause as above (1024 breakpoint layout congestion).

issues: Brochure lists 'Website – NNPOLYCHEM.COM' as a company identifier but www.nnpolychem.com is not rendered anywhere on the site (verified via grep + runtime scan across all 10 pages). Recommend adding a Website line in the Footer contact block and/or Contact page 'Direct Channels' card so tender/audit reviewers can cross-check against brochure page 1.
Two logout controls remain (admin-logout-top + sidebar admin-logout-btn) — cosmetic, flagged in iter 2, non-blocking.

action_items: HIGH: Fix header nav at 1024px viewport so 'Get Quote' primary CTA is fully visible — either bump the desktop nav breakpoint from lg (1024px) to xl (1280px) so 1024px shows the mobile hamburger, or tighten desktop nav gap/padding so the sum fits in 1024px. Also fixes 'Corporate Brochure' hero stat card truncation at 1024.

MEDIUM: Add the brochure fact 'Website: www.nnpolychem.com' to the Footer's Contact column (and optionally Contact page). Currently the URL is only inside the brochure PDF, not on the live site — breaks brochure↔site cross-verification for tender submissions.
LOW (from iter 2, still open): remove duplicate admin logout control.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx desktop nav breakpoint is set at `lg:` (Tailwind default 1024px) but the aggregate item width at that breakpoint exceeds 1024px because logo takes ~161px, 7 nav items ~600px, Call Us ~117px, Get Quote ~79px plus gaps and padding. Push desktop layout to xl (1280) or hide 1-2 nav items into the hamburger below 1152px.

Footer.jsx has PAN + GST but no Website URL; brochure page 1 lists Website as a first-tier identifier so add `Website: www.nnpolychem.com` (or make it a link to the same domain / add to COMPANY.website in /app/frontend/src/lib/company.js and render).
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') (iter 2 flagged) — non-blocking.
Backend was NOT re-run per main agent guidance — pytest suite last passed at 37/37 in iter 2 with no server.py changes since.

success_rate.frontend: 97% — 2 layout issues at exactly 1024px + 1 missing brochure fact string

test_credentials: admin@nilaynarayan.com / NN@dmin2025 — verified working via UI + curl /api/auth/login.
seed_data_creation: Created for this UAT run: TEST_UAT_Quote, TEST_UAT_Quote2 (quote enquiries), TEST_UAT_Contact (contact enquiry with XSS payload in message — stored inert, no execution), TEST_UAT_Vendor_Co (vendor). All persisted in Mongo and visible in admin API GET /api/enquiries and /api/vendors. Emergent Resend live email dispatch fired for each (user's inbox will receive 4 real emails from this run). Cleanup: session-scoped TEST_ prefix sweep in /app/backend/tests/conftest.py will remove them on next pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes the 1024px header breakpoint and adds website URL to footer, re-verify by: (1) set viewport 1024x800, load /, screenshot header, confirm Get Quote button fully visible with right edge <= 1024; (2) grep body innerText for 'nnpolychem.com' — should be >=1 hit on Footer (and appears on all 10 pages since Footer is global). No backend retest needed unless server.py touched. Preview URL: https://hazwaste-solutions.preview.emergentagent.com. All key testids catalogued in iter 2 context still valid.
rca of the issue: Header 1024px clip RCA: Header.jsx uses `lg:flex` (Tailwind lg = 1024px min-width) to activate desktop nav. At exactly 1024px, desktop nav renders but its intrinsic content width is ~1097px (logo 161 + 8-item nav row ~730 + right controls 210 - overlaps allowed), causing the last flex child (Get Quote button) to overflow. Because parent container has no `overflow-hidden` at the header level, the button visually clips against viewport edge. Recommended fix: change desktop nav trigger from `lg:` to `xl:` (1280px) OR add `@media (min-width:1024px) and (max-width:1151px) { hide 1-2 nav items or condense to hamburger }`. Website-URL RCA: /app/frontend/src/lib/company.js only exports name/tagline/phones/email/address/pan/gst but no `website` property, so no component can render it. Add `website: 'www.nnpolychem.com'` to COMPANY object and reference it in Footer.jsx Contact column.
